assetFieldNameDesc: Images found in the bound note are written into this asset field. Default: 内容图.
replaceExistingDesc: Use a dedicated field for generated content images. Turn this off to skip cells that already have assets.
autoSyncVisibleDesc: After database row or field changes, sync databases that are open in the current interface.
noCurrentDatabase: Put the cursor in a database first, or open a document that contains a database.
noVisibleDatabase: No visible database is available to sync.
noCurrentBlock: The current selected block was not found.
noCurrentImageBlock: The block containing this image was not found.
noImagesInCurrentDocument: No image is available to append in the current document.
noBoundDatabase: The current block or document is not bound to a database.
noAssetField: No asset field named ${field} was found. Create an asset field in the database first.
noBoundAssetField: No asset field named ${field} was found in the bound database.
noContentImagesInDatabase: The content image field in the bound database has no images.
selectContentImageSourceDesc: The current block or document is bound to multiple available sources. Choose which database content images to insert.
imageAlreadyInContentImages: This image is already in the content image field.
imagesAlreadyInContentImages: These images are already in the content image field.
contentImagesAlreadyInBlock: The content images are already near the current block.
appendSummary: Appended to content images: updated ${updated} database items, checked ${scanned}.
syncSummary: Content image sync finished: updated ${changed} rows, scanned ${scanned} rows.
